title: Rondonópolis, MT — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Rondonópolis, MT: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Rondonópolis is a city in MT with a population of 244,897. A rapidly growing agribusiness city in southern Mato Grosso, known as the gateway to the Pantanal and a major soybean producer.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
